2606.19992.title: Beyond Static Endpoints: Tool Programs as an Interface for Flexible Agentic Web Services
2606.19992.paper_summary: In the agentic web era, LLM-based agents increasingly invoke web services as tools, yet most interfaces remain \emph{static endpoints} that poorly express long-horizon workflows with loops, conditionals, joins, and retries. We present ToolPro, which represents an agent's tool intent as an \emph{executable tool program} that compactly encodes multi-step service interactions with explicit effect types. ToolPro combines constraint-guided program construction, effect-aware replay for exactly-once state-modifying calls, and a profile-driven policy that decides when program execution outperforms stepwise calling. We instantiate ToolPro over MCP-style services with WebAssembly sandboxing and evaluate it on diverse workflows of real-world applications. ToolPro reduces end-to-end latency by up to 53.4\% and client-side traffic by up to 96.1\%, with larger gains under higher network latency and workflow complexity.
2606.19992.paper_summary_zh: 在代理網絡時代，基於大型語言模型的代理越來越多地將網絡服務作為工具，但大多數介面仍然是\emph{靜態端點}，無法有效表達具有循環、條件、聯接和重試的長期工作流程。我們提出了ToolPro，它將代理的工具意圖表示為\emph{可執行工具程序}，緊湊地編碼了具有明確效果類型的多步服務交互。ToolPro結合了約束引導的程序構建、效果感知的重放以確保狀態修改調用的精確一次性，以及一種基於配置的策略，決定何時程序執行優於逐步調用。我們在具有WebAssembly沙箱的MCP風格服務上實現了ToolPro，並在各種現實應用的工作流程上進行了評估。ToolPro將端到端延遲降低了最多53.4\%，客戶端流量降低了最多96.1\%，在更高的網絡延遲和工作流程複雜性下獲得了更大的收益。
2606.19992.author: Mugeng Liu et.al.
2606.19992.authors: Mugeng Liu, Shuoqi Li, Yixuan Zhang, Yun Ma
